To: Investors@equityresearch.sg  
From: Dr. Emily Tan, Senior Analyst  
Date: October 28, 2023  

Subject: Forthcoming Earnings Report - Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd.  

Dear Investors,  

As we approach the Q3 earnings release for Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202345678D), scheduled for November 15, 2023, we maintain a cautiously optimistic outlook. This telecommunications company, led by CEO Mr. Alvin Koh, has shown resilience amid market fluctuations. The anticipated earnings per share (EPS) are projected to be in the range of $0.15 to $0.20.  

For further information, please contact me directly at +65 6123 4567 or via email at emily.tan@equityresearch.sg. Additionally, all inquiries can be directed to our office assistant, Ms. Joanne Lim, NRIC S8765432B.  

We will provide a detailed analysis post-announcement to give you a comprehensive view of the company’s financial health and prospects.  

Kind regards,  
Dr. Emily Tan  
Senior Analyst, Equity Research
